utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each is fully detailed: the property includes name, type, price, and status; financing includes program, approved_amount, interest_rate, amortization, monthly_payment, cash_to_close, and notes; legal_services includes provider, cost range, and list of services; moving_services includes provider, cost, details, and timing; setup_services includes breakdown of utility setup costs; and total_budget includes a complete cost breakdown. All are fully specified with appropriate details.
